g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Map interface in Java?')
sendPrompt('Explain HashMap in Java with collision handling and load factor')
sendPrompt('Explain LinkedHashMap in Java and how it enables LRU cache')
sendPrompt('Explain TreeMap in Java with floor, ceiling, higher, lower key methods')
sendPrompt('Explain ConcurrentHashMap in Java and how it handles thread safety')
sendPrompt('Explain Hashtable in Java and how it differs from HashMap')
sendPrompt('Explain WeakHashMap in Java and when to use it')
sendPrompt('Explain IdentityHashMap in Java and its reference equality behavior')
sendPrompt('What is Properties class in Java?')

svg.text: Map branch — does NOT extend Collection
